CustomField.formula: IF(leaseworks__Event_Type__c = 'LLP Replacement', text(leaseworks__Type__c) & ' LLP', CASE(leaseworks__Type__c, "Airframe", leaseworks__Event_Type__c, "Landing Gear - Left Main", "Left LG", "Landing Gear - Nose", "Nose LG", "Landing Gear - Right Main", "Right LG", text(leaseworks__Type__c) ))
CustomField.label: Assembly Display Name
